scene.speaker: The Lord Marshall
scene.line: Aric, shield of the realm, you have carried this kingdom through fire and returned its people to peace time and again.

scene.speaker: Aric
scene.line: I have only done my duty, my lord.

scene.speaker: Lyria
scene.line: If they carve that on your grave, I am haunting the sculptor.

scene.speaker: Aric
scene.line: You assume I plan to die first.

scene.speaker: Lyria
scene.line: I assume if you do, it will be while frowning heroically.

scene.speaker: Captain Elowen
scene.line: Urgent reports from Whispering Woods. Raids at Verdant Clearing. Missing scouts. Survivors claim the attackers moved with military precision.

scene.speaker: The Lord Marshall
scene.line: Then we act before fear spreads faster than truth. Aric, go at once. Keep the force small. Quiet answers are often the cleanest.

scene.speaker: The Lord Marshall
scene.line: Bring them home. The realm still needs its shield.

end_beat: Close on the Lord Marshall's hand on Aric's shoulder. Hold one beat too long. Music dips into unease.
